children.label: A
children.text: $50,000,000 shall be made available to the BJA Director to carry out this subchapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: $25,000,000 shall be made available to the COPS Director to carry out this subchapter; and

children.label: A
children.text: $67,000,000 shall be made available to the BJA Director to carry out this subchapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: $33,000,000 shall be made available to the COPS Director to carry out this subchapter.

children.heading: Offset
children.label: b Offset
children.text: Any funds appropriated for the Comprehensive School Safety Initiative of the National Institute of Justice in fiscal year 2018 shall instead be used for the purposes in subsection (a).
